title: Browser
text: Browser Specifies the web browser to use for testing Uniface web applications. Browser = BrowserExecutable For example: browser="C:/Program Files (x86)/Google/Chrome/Application/chrome.exe" Default value: Default web browser File section: [install] Description The default value depends on the default browser that was selected on your machine at the time of installation. However, you can specify any supported web browser. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
